items.name: Dynamic Fluffy Dragon {White Fluff)
items.description:
Animated mouth and eyes!

Skin is colorable!

Supports accessory's too!

Your avatar scale will have a big effect on how big the head is.

Other Heads: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=justinlampkin&salesTypeFilter=1
